pi_items.source: Task description (lines 4) and VW ID.4 official specifications: CCS for DC fast charging (up to 170kW), Type 2 (Mennekes) for AC charging
Task description (line 5) and VW ID.4 specifications: ID.4 does not natively support CHAdeMO connector, which is a Japanese standard incompatible with CCS-port vehicles
Task description (line 2): 'Enable EV Mode' is the primary goal. Task is specifically for configuring Sygic GPS for an Electric Vehicle (Volkswagen ID.4)

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Sygic GPS Navigation for a Volkswagen ID.4 electric vehicle. The required connectors are CCS (Combined Charging System for DC fast charging up to 170kW) and Type 2 (Mennekes, for AC charging). CHAdeMO is correctly specified as a forbidden connector because the VW ID.4 uses CCS/Type 2 and does not natively support the CHAdeMO standard (a Japanese charging protocol). EV mode must be enabled as the vehicle is fully electric.
